title: SAST/SCA finding allowlist
description: Schema for security/sast/allowlist.yaml — the version-controlled baseline. Suppresses matching findings from the gate only; findings stay visible in reports.

id.description: Exact rule id (Semgrep check_id) or advisory id (RUSTSEC-*/GHSA-*/CVE-*) to suppress.

locationPattern.description: Regex matched against Finding.location ('path:line' or 'package@version'). Invalid regex => gate exit 2.

justification.description: Why accepted (false positive or accepted risk). Blank => gate error.

expiry.description: Optional ISO-8601 date. If past, the entry stops suppressing and the finding blocks again.
